articles.content: Today I’m happy,” said the 55-year-old domestic worker from Bogor, sobbing. Along with other domestic workers who attended the Apr 21 parliamentary session, Suranti cheered and applauded. “It feels like a dream. “I’m happy because now there is protection for domestic workers

articles.title: 3 retailers caught using misleading website features such as fake visitor counts, countdown timers
articles.content: SINGAPORE – Three online retailers have been caught using misleading features to influence shoppers by Singapore’s consumer and competition regulator. Upon examination of the website’s source code, the regulator found that the numbers were randomly generated.

articles.title: Suspension of M1-Simba merger assessment: What are radio frequency bands and why telcos are assigned them
articles.content: The four mobile network operators here are M1, Singtel, StarHub Mobile and Simba Telecom. Radio frequencies are a part of the electromagnetic spectrum used for wireless communication and signal transmission. Its usage includes: radio, aircraft navigation, marine radio, television broadcasting, mobile networks and even satellite systems
